fields.name: Source Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of source document to which the warehouse activity line relates, such as sales, purchase, and production.

fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the source document that the entry originates from.

fields.name: Source Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the source document

fields.name: Source Subline No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the subline number of the source document

fields.name: Source Document
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document that the line relates to.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the location where the pick activity occurs.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item number of the item to be picked.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Qty. to Handle
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units to handle in this warehouse activity.

fields.name: Qty. to Handle (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units to handle (base unit of measure) in this warehouse activity.

fields.name: Qty. Handled
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of items on the line that have been handled in this warehouse activity.

fields.name: Qty. Handled (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of items on the line that have been handled in this warehouse activity.

fields.name: Qty. in Inventory
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity in the inventory.

fields.name: Qty. Available to Pick
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that is actually available to pick.

fields.name: Potential Pickable Qty.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the maximum quantity that can be considered for moving. This quantity consists of items in all the bins excluding Receipt bins, bins that are blocked, dedicated, blocked by item tracking or items that are being picked. This quantity cannot be more than the total quantity in the warehouse including adjustment bins.

fields.name: Available Qty. Not in Ship Bin
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity available to pick in the warehouse excluding the shipment bins, bins that are blocked, dedicated, blocked by item tracking or items that are being picked.

fields.name: Qty. Assigned
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that has been handled for other source lines. If tracking is enabled, then the same source line is also included. The quantity consists of the current execution of create warehouse pick action.

fields.name: Qty. Reserved in Warehouse
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity reserved in warehouse. This quantity consists of inventory from reservation including inventory that is picked or being picked but not yet shipped or consumed. It excludes the quantity blocked by bins, item tracking or reserved against dedicated bins.

fields.name: Qty. Res. in Pick/Ship Bins
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity reserved in pick/ship bins.

fields.name: Qty. Reserved for this Line
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity reserved for the selected line.

fields.name: Qty. in Blocked Item Tracking
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity in blocked item tracking for the pickable/takeable bins.

fields.name: Qty. in Active Pick Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity assigned in active warehouse pick documents.

fields.name: Qty. in Pickable Bins
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity in pickable bins. The quantity is not reduced by item tracking or items that are being picked.

fields.name: Qty. in Warehouse
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity in warehouse.

fields.name: Qty. Block. Item Tracking Res.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity in blocked item tracking for the quantity reserved in warehouse.

fields.name: Qty. in Active Pick Lines Res.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity assigned in active warehouse pick documents.
